<<Mathematical Journey>>

Angel has written a total of 80 letters.  
Most of the letters are put into large envelopes.  
The remaining 20 letters are put into small envelopes.  

* * *

Each large envelope contains 2 letters.  
The total number of letters is 80.  
The small envelopes contain 20 letters.  

* * *

The large envelopes hold the rest of the letters.  
The total letters minus small letters equals large letters.  
The number of large envelopes is calculated by dividing.  

The total letters are 80.  
The small letters are 20.  
The large letters are 60.
